political.s: As a private pet insurance company, Embrace Pet Insurance does not appear to have federal PAC contributions or notable lobbying activities. No direct political donations were disclosed in available records.

charity.s: Embrace demonstrates strong charitable commitment with $788,000 raised in 2024 for over 140 nonprofits, including partnerships with the American Veterinary Medical Foundation for veterinary scholarships. The company matches 100% of employee donations and has generated over $1.2 million cumulatively since 2020 through its EmbraceCLE Challenge.
charity.focus: Animal welfare, veterinary education, homelessness support, community nonprofits

environment.s: Limited public environmental data available. Company website mentions green policies but specific initiatives, carbon footprint reduction, or sustainability certifications are not documented in publicly available sources.

labor.s: Embrace has received recognition as a top workplace with Great Place to Work certification and multiple Top Workplace Awards. Employee feedback on Comparably shows mixed ratings on executive team (47/100) and compensation in top 50% for similar-sized companies. Average salary is $146,954.

dei.s: No specific DEI policies, initiatives, or HRC CEI scores found in available public sources. Company describes itself as having a vibrant culture and emphasizing inclusion but provides limited formal DEI documentation.

animals.s: Embrace Pet Insurance is an insurance provider for companion animals and does not conduct animal testing. The company actively supports animal welfare through partnerships with veterinary organizations and shelter medicine initiatives.

guns.s: As a pet insurance company, Embrace Pet Insurance has no involvement in firearm sales or manufacturing. Not applicable to business model.

privacy.s: Embrace has comprehensive privacy policies covering website, mobile app, and policy data. The company implements physical, technical, and administrative safeguards and partnered with Ketch for privacy compliance maturity. Data retention practices and CCPA compliance are documented.

execPay.s: Limited public disclosure of executive compensation ratios. CEO Brian Macias leads company with average employee salary at $146,954. No SEC proxy statements available as private company; specific CEO-to-worker pay ratios not disclosed.
